---
title: "Vincenzo Palazeti"
image: images/me.jpg
about:
  template: trestles
  image-shape: rounded
  image-width: 16em
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/vicenzo-palazeti/
    - icon: twitter
      text: Twitter
      href: https://twitter.com/
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/vinnie-palazeti
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:vinnie.palazeti@indystats.com
---

### hi there!

<p class="topbr">I'm Vinnie. I am a Lead Data Scientist at AlphaPeak. Prior to this, I was employed as a Data Scientist at Sports Betting Innotive Analytics (SBIA). I have extensive experience competing in the sports betting startup space, building production grade python software, solving daily novel problems, and evaluating diverse statistical models. </p>

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### education

<div class="topbr">
<p class="custom-subtitle">`r fontawesome::fa("graduation-cap", fill = "#9B111E", a11y = "sem")` **MS in Applied Statistics, 2020**</p>
<p class="custom-subtitle2">University of Loyola Chicago</p>

<p class="custom-subtitle">`r fontawesome::fa("graduation-cap", fill = "#9B111E", a11y = "sem")` **BS in Professional Selling, 2017**</p>
<p class="custom-subtitle2">Ball State University</p>
</div>

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### experience

<div class="topbr">
<p class="custom-subtitle">`r fontawesome::fa("chart-bar", fill = "#9B111E", a11y = "sem")` **Lead Data Scientist, 2022-present**</p>
<p class="custom-subtitle2">AlphaPeak</p>

<p class="custom-subtitle">`r fontawesome::fa("chart-line", fill = "#9B111E", a11y = "sem")` **Data Scientist, 2021-2022**</p>
<p class="custom-subtitle2">Sports Betting Innovative Analytics</p>

<p class="custom-subtitle">`r fontawesome::fa("chalkboard-user", fill = "#9B111E", a11y = "sem")` **Statistician, 2020-2021**</p>
<p class="custom-subtitle2">Center for Criminal Justice Research</p>
</div>
